problem_title: Travel Rule reviews depend on manual handoffs
problem_description: Stablecoin issuers face delays and gaps when Travel Rule messages and exception handling remain disconnected from broader compliance workflows. This fragmentation weakens audit evidence and complicates regulatory review readiness for compliance teams.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects originator and beneficiary data, message status, exceptions, wallet and customer records into one operational workflow that supports case management and audit-ready evidence for stablecoin issuers.
workflow_title: From Travel Rule exceptions to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY manages Travel Rule message status and exceptions by routing data through case review, evidence preservation and compliance reporting for stablecoin issuers.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for stablecoin Travel Rule operations?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides stablecoin issuers a connected workflow connecting Travel Rule data, message routing, status tracking, customer records, and compliance cases in a single operational layer.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage Travel Rule exceptions?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures exception handling workflows by linking flagged Travel Rule events to case management for investigator review and resolution within compliance processes.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve Travel Rule audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves audit-ready evidence by recording decision logs, message history, case documentation and compliance actions for Travel Rule reviews and reporting.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing Travel Rule providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects outputs from multiple Travel Rule providers, enabling coordinated routing, status updates and exception workflows without disrupting current technology stacks.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace Travel Rule technology providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace Travel Rule providers but sits above them, turning their outputs into structured compliance workflows, cases, evidence and reports.
final_title: Structure Travel Rule operations for stablecoins
final_description: Review how SFTY organizes Travel Rule routing, exceptions, data and audit evidence into one controlled compliance workflow.
